steps.title: Read the bar graph
steps.content: The bar graph shows the number of defective lightbulbs in each of the five trials: Trial 1 = 3, Trial 2 = 4, Trial 3 = 5, Trial 4 = 4, Trial 5 = 5.

steps.title: Compute the mean
steps.content:
Add all five values and divide by 5:
$$\frac{3 + 4 + 5 + 4 + 5}{5} = \frac{21}{5} = 4.2$$
